race.description: Courthouse Hotel Gunnedah Showcase Lightning Hcp
race.comment: HELLCIBELL (6) has been about the money at both runs this prep, most recently behind the promising Golden Straand over 1100m at Hawkesbury. Usually peaks third-up and she will find this a little easier. The speedy CHANDON STAR (4) has been nailed late in his last couple so coming back in trip looks a good move. TOUGH GUY (9) returns from a lay-off. Placed in a recent Muswellbrook trial. Opened last campaign with a win at Tamworth over 1000m. Very good fresh performer who is in the mix. ENTERPRISE LEGEND (5) returns from a spell. Recent trial winner at Tamworth. Opened last campaign with a win at Tamworth over 1000m. Include.
